                • Advisory board

                Dan Williams

                Assistant Professor
                • Facebook
                • X

                Location:

                Gilbert Place, RM 4207
                220 Gilbert St.
                Blacksburg, VA 24060

                Contact:

                djwillia@vt.edu
                (540) 231-0415

                Research interests

                • systems
                • operating systems kernels
                • virtualization
                • security

                Google Scholar | Homepage

                Education

                • 2013: Ph.D. and M.S., computer science, Cornell University
                • 2003: B.S. in computer science and B.A. in mathematics, University of Rochester

                Follow Computer Science

                Facebook X Instagram Linked In YouTube

                Blacksburg  campus
                Torgersen Hall RM 3160
                620 Drillfield Dr.
                Blacksburg, VA 24061
                (540) 231-6931 (undergraduate)
                (540) 231-0746 (graduate)

                Institute for Advanced Computing
                3625 Potomac Ave.
                Alexandria, VA 22305
                (703) 538-8370 (M.S. and Ph.D.)
                (703) 538-3768 (M.Eng)

                900 N. Glebe Rd.
                Arlington, VA 22203
